offer: For restaurant owners processing 20–50 reservations/week, manual booking causes customer dissatisfaction. We automate the booking process instead of manual reservation management via phone and paper.
problem: Booking errors and customer dissatisfaction due to manual reservation processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to restaurant owners with demo video
Engage in community forums for restaurant tools
try_it: Let users try simple online booking interface and Manual invoice entry form on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
